---
title: "About"
title-block: false
---

This website is intended as an exploratory and diagnostic dashboard for the viewing of monitoring data from the experimental site "Plantaditsch" (IT-Pla) in Caldaro sulla Strada del Vino, Bolzano, Italy. Managed by the [Tree Ecophysiology and Ecosystems](https://treeecophysiology.unibz.it/) group of the Free University of Bozen-Bolzano.



INSERT VARIABLE DESCRIPTIONS HERE
